# Sweat: Fitness App For Women · Fitness

Generated: Jul 21, 2026, 7:09 PM

## **Contents** {#toc}

- [Pricing and paywall](#theme-pricing_paywall)
- [Feature requests](#theme-feature_requests)
- [Sync and accounts](#theme-sync_accounts)


## **Pricing and paywall** {#theme-pricing_paywall}

   **Pricing and paywall.**
      1 recent review(s) mention pricing and paywall.
      Review window: Mar 31, 2026 - Apr 6, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention price, subscriptions, or paywalls. This can signal pricing sensitivity in the niche.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Patricia Marina Sanabria Avalos_, Mar 31, 2026, 1/5: "I paid for the subscription and it is still listed as expired. I have already asked for assistance and they do not resolve it."
            2. _Lauren Pfaff_, Apr 6, 2026, 5/5: "Awesome app~filters on choosing workouts,recipes etc. *Plus doesn't trap you like all the other ones I have read about(being so difficult to end your subscription).I have just literally had to cancel mine(must reduce my costs) and it was the easiest process ever~plus I have already received confirmation from PayPal to confirm they won't be automatically deducting 👌 5 ⭐️'s to this amazing crowd and I will still be following Kayla on Insta because she is such an inspiration 🤩"

## **Feature requests** {#theme-feature_requests}

   **Feature requests.**
      2 recent review(s) mention feature requests.
      Review window: Apr 14, 2026 - Jul 11, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users are asking for missing capabilities. This can reveal roadmap opportunities.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Danielle E_, Apr 14, 2026, 4/5: "I like the Sweat app and the variety of workouts. I often get bored of the same workout format, so as to not lose motivation I change my program up or find on demand workouts. I find it annoying that I can't see sample workouts when I am browsing the programs. To see if the workouts are something that I would enjoy, I have to set it as my program and then go in and view the first week's workouts. Please add sample workouts as the descriptions are quite vague."
            2. _Brooke Ainsworth_, Jul 11, 2026, 5/5: "Lots of different programs to choose from! Would love to see the introduction of a feature to change the order of the workout - would be handy for when stations at the gym aren't available."

## **Sync and accounts** {#theme-sync_accounts}

   **Sync and accounts.**
      1 recent review(s) mention sync and accounts.
      Review window: Apr 12, 2026 - Apr 12, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention sync, backup, login, or accounts. This points to trust and cross-device workflow expectations.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Noa Twogood_, Apr 12, 2026, 4/5: "So far I love this app and its user interface! Its easy to use and fairly well organized with workout diversity at your finger tips. My only wish would be to be able to sync my Sweat workouts with my My Fitness Pal food diary. Heres to hoping that might happen one day 🤞🤞🤞"
